Package org.eventb.core.ast

Class DefaultSimpleVisitor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultSimpleVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISimpleVisitor, ISimpleVisitor2
public class DefaultSimpleVisitor extends Object implements ISimpleVisitor2
Default class implementing ISimpleVisitor. All methods are empty.

This class is intended to be extended by clients, adding useful behavior.

Since:
1.0
